target: The atmosphere suddenly changed here. It's not artificial!! It's a natural cave…!!
Yeah… and this smell. The scent of the tide… Is the sea close!?
Oh no… No way… Since when…?
Shadow presences… all around us! From the right… from the left…!! We're surrounded!
H-How many of them are there…? Are these all Stray Shadows…!?
This is bad! Shinpei, what do we do!?
(Th-That was close! I didn't expect them to just jump at us like that…!)
Shaa!! You Shadows better make way!!
T-These guys aren't gonna keep coming infinitely, are they!? Shinpei, what should we do!?
We can't beat them all! We'll take down as many as we can and run through!
Hey Ryunosuke!! If you're gonna shoot a Shadow, tell me first!! My ears are ringing!!
Sorry… But if I take the time to say it, we'll die.
Tch. To think there were Shadows swarming under the island… What a mess…
Their numbers are increasing. It's close. Their nest…!!
Jeez!! No matter how many I cut down, there's no end to them…!!
(They haven't tried to attack me at all this whole time!)
Ugh…!! The Shadows are coming closer again…!
(This is bad… we can't go any further…!!)
Get the hell out of the way!!!
(He made a flamethrower… out of a lighter and bug spray!!)
Nice!! So this is what you brought the bug spray for!!
Hell yeah!!! Just as I thought!! There isn't a creature alive that isn't afraid of fire!
Are you okay, Ushio...! We can still turn back now...!
I'm fine! We've come this far...
We're going all the way!! I hate doing things half-assed more than anything!!
Shinpei!!! I'll clear a path!!! You take care of Ushio!!!!
